reviews_data.review_text: The app needs to be improved so we can save favorites for easier ordering in future
The employees were very nice and welcoming. Everything was fine overall, but nothing really stood out to make it a great experience.
Great food
I love it!!+
Love this place!!!
Very refreshing. Calm atmosphere. My go to when it’s just not a good day for food
Great quality ingredients. Every order has been great.

It took me several years to finally make it to a Palm Berries location but Oh. My. Gosh.  What I have been missing!!!!! I’m absolutely hooked and make it a weekly treat, though I wish it could be a daily one 🫣. The Protein bowl is my fav!!!!

I’m a big fan of Palm Berries. The food is delicious and the staff is amazing.  It is my favorite spot for a quick, healthy, delicious meal or snack. Michael is a fantastic manager! He handles his team and issues with calm grace and quick problem solving.  More businesses could use a manager like this!
Had the Dubai Chocolate Açaí Bowl and it was amazing!
Perfection every time

Absolutely delicious 💖 Clean and very nice staff.
The Best and most friendliest staff at Denver!
Highly recommend Pender bender, Berry blast and barista!

The packaging is wonderful.i was skeptical because I get grossed put when I get a mushy banana. The fruit was high quality,  fresh and now I'm hooked. Protein bowl is where its at. So 😋

reviews_data.review_text: i love Palm Berries. food is yummy. service is great. employees are very nice. atmosphere is cozy and relaxed.
The employees are always happy to answer questions. I always receive prompt service and enjoy the vibe and music.
I came in 5 minutes before closing and experienced exceptional customer service. I placed a large order and it was ready very quickly.
Service was top notch
Great little place with awesome service.
It was soo good  riley was so nice and helpfull you need to get it.

reviews_data.review_text: The bowls are good.
Love the all fruit bowl
Great staff, I love the bowls.
Love Palm Berries! Best treat in town! Great customer service!
The best and it’s not even close

In the Denver renovated place so the vibe is immaculate! It’s always too cold in the winter but perfect temp in the summer. Service was great, person who served me was friendly! I prefer when they put Nutella under the fruit so theres that.
Excellent every time
What a great place!
Acai is the berries! Mixed up w/bananas & strawberries….. yum yum!
Cop of do
Love this place. The bowls are delicious. The staff is so friendly.and helpful.
DELICIOUS. Couldn’t wait to eat my first bowl of the season.
Everything is always amazing
Great customer service and the new renovation looks amazing!
Absolutely love Palm berries ! My go to for every meal , snack and dessert (:
I am hooked on Palmberries! Not only are the smoothies and bowls delicious, the staff is wonderful too. Kalina is especially welcoming and always greets me when I pick up my online order.

Always enjoy the bowls. My wife and I usually get a bowl for a meal at night if we don't want to cook.  Very much enjoy them.  We get them to go.  Today I was getting a bowl  to go for dinner tonight as I will be staying on the road.  A very foul mouth young lady was in the back discussing he trip to the ER for walking pneumonia.  Ok I get it, you were upset for whatever reason, and you were talking to your fellow employees. She had a very nasty mouth cursing and very negative.  I really don't care, for my sake. She didn't know what kind of customers were out front, cursing and talking very ugly and loud enough for me to hear all about her ER visit and how the doctor didn't give her the antibiotics she needed. Who cares!! Please use your better judgment next time to watch you foul mouth.
A quaint Little gem in Denver. I love this place!
Always have a great experience when visiting.
so good!!
So good!
Everyone is always so kind and my favorite place to eat!
Always enjoy my Palm berry bowls.  The staff is friendly and professional.  Bowls are fresh and delicious.  There is a gluten free granola option
Customer service is great! Customers are greeted with a smile. Atmosphere is welcoming.
Workers are very nice and good clean store and the food was excellent I totally recommend this place to eat if u love fruit
Love getting a bowl or smoothie here! Delicious!
Placed a mobile order for a Sami Bowl recently and was very pleased with everything.  Food tasted great, service was top notch and the atmosphere was great.  Will definitely be back!
Great healthy place to eat

I absolutely love the food here and order the bowls for pickup often. Best açaí bowl I’ve ever had!

However, the cleaner that they use inside is super strong, like pine sol or something. I couldn’t wait to get out of there and definitely could not have sat and ate a meal inside.
This place is awesome and do are the employee
Very cool store with great service
always great food and staff is very nice!
Great food choices.
Really fast calm and yummy

I could go on about how amazing Palm Berries is. Nothing beats it! I absolutely love the options, especially the Sami Bowl. I usually substitute almonds for strawberries because it’s pretty filling, but you can add anything! The Acai is refreshing and does not melt fast. The fruit is always fresh and prepared perfectly. I also choose gluten free/vegan granola.

review_questions.Recommended dishes: Nutella, Chocolate Chips, Classic Base Jumbo Create Your Own Bowl

reviews_data.review_text:
7-18-24, 743p:
Attentive and greeted me with a smile: long-haired Michael understands the needs and concerns of going above and beyond to meet customer expectations. A business truly needs more employees like him to understand the customer’s stomach is where your money is. That young man needs to be recognized for his outstanding service and commitment to happiness and nutritional values. Most places have teenagers hanging around chatting and on their phones, literally doing nothing: we had more than one worker ask us if we needed anything, while another was busy taking trash out and trying to get the store cleaned up. Really appreciate seeing a team like this and will continue to come here in the future especially during the summer when unable to consume hot unhealthy food options nearby. This place can easily be breakfast, lunch, dinner, dessert or a snack and I wouldn’t have it any other way. Thank you for being here.
Palm Bowl, granola, extra Nutella
-H
Love Palm Berries in Denver!  Great staff and awesome smoothies and berry bowls!

I’m been coming here for years. The prices have just gone up and the food quality has just gotten worse. Today I went and got a bowl. The pineapple on it is my favorite part, it was so unripe and no flavor. For $15 do better.
Amazing all the way around.
I love Palm Berries but some products they use are not the best and contain Bioengineered ingredients, i.e Nutella and other sauces /granola,  just be aware before adding to your bowl or shake!
I’m gonna try them all but I’m stuck on the Sami. Amazing!
Reagan was so knowledgeable and kind while taking our order.
Everything I have tried is amazing and it’s the best açaí around! Always fast and amazing environment
I love this place, I could eat this every day. The staff is also very friendly.
Awesome every time
People are always helpful and pleasant, I love the products they are so tasty and there are a lot of yummy choices!😊
Best Acai Bowls around! Loaded with add-ons and delicious.

Protein.
Bowl was amazing, The place was very clean,and smells amazing!!! Great staff

3/16i order from this place multiple times a week. I called to ask if I had time to still order but the kid that answered was rude and told me to hold so I did… called back 5 mins laters after waiting and they had turned the phones off. I won’t be back.
Great place to grab a quick liquid lunch that’s healthy.
This place is perfect, the best acai bowls in the area! The portions for a regular sized bowl are actually filling! And the fruit is very fresh, anytime I order from here its amazing.
As soon as I walk in it is such an amazing environment. Always excited for my bowl!

Yummy 😋😋😋
Make your sign bigger! I never knew this place was here!

I was so excited to once again get a bowl of açaí! After a short shopping trip, I treated myself to a dessert. I could not remember what I got last time but after showing a picture of my previous bowl the cashier confirmed it as the palm bowl. He was right and I’m grateful! Service was quick. Presentation was great but the taste was supreme! I got the snack size and it was more than enough for one person. Nice ambiance and music was fun. Great experience!
The service is always very friendly and quick. The food is always delicious. Palm Berries is my favorite place to get food from.
Tried the Harvest Bowl - she LOVED IT!!
Great service and food
One of my favorite restaurants! Everything is delicious and there are so many options. I always thoroughly enjoy every aspect of my visits.
Quick easy ordering process. Tap to pay, didn’t have to wait more than 5 mins and bowls were ready to go!
I would rate 10 stars if I could. Palms Berries you are the best!
Best açaí ever
Not only is their smoothies and bowls amazing every time I go, so is the atmosphere inside. It’s a very unique place.
Yummy!!

I love the bowls here and the staff are friendly. I recently moved to the area and tried PB for the first time last week. I’ve already been back twice. Really fresh and delicious ingredients. So glad to have a great smoothie place!

review_questions.Recommended dishes: Classic Acai Base, Blueberries, Almond Butter

reviews_data.review_text: Love the presentation of the bowls & theres a lot in them! They hook you up 🎉
The atmosphere is calm and clean. Service is very friendly and fast. The food is absolutely amazing!
Bowls are always delish!

review_questions.Recommended dishes: Classic Acai Base, White Chocolate, Blueberries

reviews_data.review_text: I literally stop here at least 3 times a week... I LOVE IT HERE!!
Love my fruit bowls could eat them everyday 😆
I crave Palm Berries every so often, nice to have this nearby and service is always fast

Very friendly and extremely good! Every time I go food is fresh and delish. Love this place! They will give you a sample of the bases if you are not sure which one you want. Highly recommend. Great place! Super cute on the inside!!!
Love the create your own bowl!!!   So good!
Definitely my favorite açai bowl place, a good amount of fruit and generous portions.  The snack is usually more than sufficient.
Really great food and nice people!
Since discovering Palm Berries in Denver, NC we’ve become OBSESSED!!  Everything is delicious and the staff is so personable! They have even memorized our favorites before ordering 😁
The new Island Bowl is delicious!
Always fantastic customer service, and best açaí bowls ever (from someone who eats them all over the country)!!! Love the sunset bowl!
We love palm, berries, açai bowls and smoothies!

This was my first time visiting.  The cashier who greeted me was friendly, but the manager seemed a bit perturbed that I arrived 30 minutes before closing and wasn't sure what I wanted to try. The smoothie bowl that I got was decent, but overall it just wasn't a welcoming experience. Therefore, I probably won't be returning.
Staff are so sweet! Fruit is always fresh and tasty. Bowls were made quickly and visually appealing
Great bowls and fast and friendly service.  Highly recommend this place.  Perfect Summer food.
Taylor was professional and effective with my on “the go” order! It was thoroughly completed and DELICIOUS‼️
The cashier was very sweet and helpful. Very respectful as well!

I love the palm berry bowls!!! I recently tried smoothie King's version ( closer to my house) and was so disappointed. They are not worth it compared to the palm Berry quality!!!! Palmberry has so much more fruit in their bowls, much higher quality. Whenever I am in Denver I always order it for myself and my daughter :) she always asks for it!!
Always outstanding! Love the options and fresh ingredients…
They are always nice an very friendly at both locations I go to an I love the fruit bowls..
The best açaí bowls in the area.  We live in Huntersville and will drive to this location
Smoothies are always delicious and all the workers are polite and pleasant to interact with!
Cute and I love it

review_questions.Recommended dishes: Classic Base Jumbo Create Your Own Bowl

reviews_data.review_text: This place is awesome! Everything from the fruit bowls and yogurts and even the environment AND Art on the walls, it's just such a good vibing place! I love it and go at least once a week!
Nice smoothies, great variety, prices a bit high. Worst though is the overwhelming scent of Fabuloso cleaner. I could never set inside there and eat.
good everytime, fresh fruit, fast service, friendly workers🙌❤️
One of the best acai bowls I’ve ever had.
#Addicted. Haven’t had anything here I didn’t LOVE. I drive about 20 minutes one way a couple times a week to get a bowl.
Very nice employees and the service was great! I ordered 4 bowls and they were ready so fast!
Really enjoyed my experience here. Very clean place with really yummy and healthy Açaí options. Will be coming back!
Awesome fruit bowls!! We love Palm Berries. Staff is excellent!!
Love the bowls. Wish they had smaller size. I would go more often.

The best acai bowl you'll ever have!! The fruit is always fresh & ripe, the base is flavorful & smooth, and there are a lot of toppings to choose from.  It's a treat to have this locally owned business in town; you won't be disappointed & you'll become a regular!!
Friendly staff and delicious bowls! I can eat here everyday.
Staff was friendly and quick
Took the fiance here for the first time. It's one of my favorite places to stop when I go on my lunchbreak, and now it's his too!! That's for always making delicious smoothies 😋
I always get the Sami bowl it's delicious! The staff is so friendly, fast and efficient.
Keep up the good work- maybe consider different music- like KLOVE
Love Palm Berries! Always fast and delicious ♡
Really enjoy the fresh fruits and healthy toppings at Palm Berries! The Denver, NC staff is very efficient and kind.
I LOVE the Pure Bowl at Palm Berries! It is delicious!!
Super fast and delicious as usual!  Everyone so friendly!
Always nice, helpful and the food is always delicious ❤️
If you are looking for fresh açaí bowl; it’s here in Denver and I got 10% off too.
Everyone is always so friendly, and the food is great!
Cant find any other acai place that tastes as good as this one!!
First and last time coming.. paid a lot for the queen city bowl for half of the fruit, that was suppose to be added missing!
One of the best açaí bowls I’ve had since moving to Charlotte!
My favorite !
Bowls are delicious! Had a great patient gal today taking my order.
Thought i would give this place a try. Love the many different options and substitutions offered. Very friendly and thoughtful employees. Food was amazing and fresh.  Will be coming back.
Love Palm Berries. Fresh açaí & fruit.
I love eating here the smoothies and the bowls are delicious.
Always a great place to go
Everything is so good here. And great service too.
Love this place, our bowls are always completed as requested!
employees are so nice, love the store and environment!!!
Quick and refreshing! Friendly team, excellent bowls!
I love the various fruit options, it's always delicious!
Absolutely love this place!!
Best açaí bowls I’ve ever had. I’ve become a regular now. I get one 1-2 times a week. Love this place!
Greta service and amazing food!
Always a great experience at Palm Berries of Denver!
Always a wonderful experience with amazing fruit bowls and smoothies!
Absolutely love the coconut bowl. It’s amazing
Best place around nothing like it anywhere else. The staff is always super helpful and friendly.
The best qcai bowls I haver ever had!!  The pure base is phenomenal!!
I love Palm Berries, it tastes great, but feels healthy and light.
Every store has been amazing.  I order frequently as it is well worth it! All staff has been amazing and quick.  Love that the app is extremely user friendly.
Alway delicious. The bowls are a nice refreshing change from the typical snack or meal. They are very filling.
Great service!
Absolutely love their acai bowls!!!! If I could afford one every day, I'd be one way!!! Very fresh fruit!!!!!
Very good.
Palm Berries is a favorite of our entire family.  The BEST Acai bowls we have ever had anywhere!  So refreshing and delicious!

My first time ever having an açaí bowl…wow. Absolutely delicious. My friend always talks about Palm Berries so I had to give it a try. I was blown away by how tasty the bowl was!! The serving was also huge and I will have to finish the rest tomorrow. (And I can’t wait for that😂). I got the Palm Bowl. Yum yum yum!!!!
Food is soooo good and refreshing!!!

So good! Super fresh and well priced. Cutest dining area as well. Have ordered a couple times to my work and service was fast and the bowls were fresh! Will definitely be ordering from here regularly!
Food is good but bartender not so good.
They have the best açaí bowls I’ve ever had!!
I ordered online and payed in store and service was great. My Açaí bowl was completed in a timely manner and their prices were great compared to others.
Friendly staff, very clean, lots of options, and so good!
The green sip is very tasty!
After one visit I was hooked , there fruit bowls are always so fresh and delicious. I’m so glad denver now has a healthy snack option when your out and about.
The bowls are SO GOOD! They fill you up and are a healthy option for dessert!
Delicious!!!  Great service too!
Everything is always so fresh and delicious.
Absolutely love the options for my custom bowls!!! And as always.. my fruit was ripe and fresh, and made just right!!!
Rey good and great service.
We Love Palm Berries!  Honestly could eat a different bowl each meal.  Light but so filling!
Easy to order online and was ready quickly. It was so delicious!! Love Palm Berries.
Refreshing.. perfect meal to start with.
Place is good!

I loved coming here! bowls were always very good & decent prices. but the last time I went there I got really sick. I was throwing up so much, could barely walk because my stomach was cramping, & I had to have my husband come pick me up from work because I couldn't drive.
I think they may have used an expired ingredient or something. I'm not sure if I will return or not.
My orders are always completed accurately and promptly no matter the time of day or how many items. The staff is super helpful and friendly!
Always awesome! Favorite place for a smoothie bowl.
Best açaí bowls EVER!!!

I LOVE this place!!! 😋 Their açaí bowls are my absolute favorite (especially the “Sammy bowl” with granola, add strawberries!!) Sooo yummy!! Highly recommend!! Plus, they are always super friendly!! I could eat here every day of my life!! 🤤
So delicious and fresh.
We love Palm Berries!!! These bowls are so refreshing and the portions are  big enough to have leftovers for an after dinner treat! Friendly faces and great location!
Fresh bowls & fruit, amazing staff and environment! love everything about palm berries!
My daughter and I love Palm Berries. So fresh and yummy.  Best açaí bowls around.  Sunset is our favorite
My favorite place! Awesome customer service! Staff are very welcoming! Wish there was one I'm Gastonia NC

The bowls are delicious! Fresh ingredients and obviously crafted with care. The young staff are on their game. Friendly faces and excellent customer service skills, much appreciated in this world today.

It is sooo amazing especially if you like fruit! Ever since I've tried it the first time I've fell in love! It seems pricey but you get your moneys worth for sure! Plus you earn points ! Who doesn't love to earn points to save money!?! They are also super friendly!
Acái bowls are amazing. Staff is super friendly, and it’s a clean chill environment.
Love this place. Have been following them before they opened the actual store. So happy they are growing in business around Denver NC. Sami bowl is my go to and OMG...so yummy!!!!!
Just love going here amazing, people there are so friendly
Always great customer service and bowls are awesome!
So glad to have acai bowls in our area. We love coming here for a healthy breakfast on the go!
So good!!!
Just got my first bowl it was amazing.  I thought it was a little pricey,  but very very good.
An açaí bowl from Palmberries makes my day!
They always deliver customer service and their bowls are always consistent. My favorite açaí place.
Best place ever
I absolutely love this place. The bowls are absolutely amazing!!!
Always great, fresh and delicious
Always kind and always with a smile….. you make me feel welcome for someone that’s new in the area.  Thank you and look forward to seeing you more and more! 🙏🏾😃

Love Palm Berries! Just found them a few weeks ago and I'm hooked! Love making my own bowl and always freshly made while you wait! YUM!!!!
STAFF IS AWESOME!!!
highly recommend
Great service and quality product

A little alow but not by that kuch plus its all worth it the stuff here tastes AMAZING. It may appear pricy but I promise you get what you pay for, it looks small hut is VERY filling.

The staff seems rather polite as well so that's a plus!

I literally crave this place now it's so good!!!
Yums!
Love Palmberries!  The bowls are amazing!  Great place for a healthy treat!
Delicious!! Staff is always so nice. Such a wonderful addition to Denver. If you haven’t been yet, treat yourself!!
A guilt free indulgence! Flavor combinations that unique and delicious.
Always have a great experience at the Denver Palm Berries. Cute decor, friendly staff, and delicious bowls. Always a treat!!

Getting to indulge in a palm bowl is always a positive experience!  The fruit is always fresh.  The bowls are prepared when you order!  The environment is clean, relaxing, and the people there are always smiling!
You can't go wrong at palm berries!!!

The Palm Berries bowls are delicious! Love them!
One suggestion however. The restaurant was decked out to the hilt with Halloween decorations ( including a life size skeleton sitting at one of the tables) Since Halloween is the most holy day of Satanism I think that glorifying this day will offend many. I recommend  against this practice of decorating for Halloween.
Amazing Açaí!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for your kind review Chris!
reviews_data.review_text: The tastiest Smoothie bowl i ever been too and the most bang for your buck when dealing with quantity! My favorite Smoothie bowl spot!
The Sami bowl is my go to for a fulfilling lunch!
Love the Burn Boot Camp bowl!!! Highly recommend!!!! Everything is AMAZING though!!!

In the Denver renovated place so the vibe is immaculate! It’s always too cold in the winter but perfect temp in the summer. Service was great, person who served me was friendly! I prefer when they put Nutella under the fruit so theres that.
Excellent every time
What a great place!
Acai is the berries! Mixed up w/bananas & strawberries….. yum yum!
Cop of do
Love this place. The bowls are delicious. The staff is so friendly.and helpful.
DELICIOUS. Couldn’t wait to eat my first bowl of the season.
Everything is always amazing
Great customer service and the new renovation looks amazing!
Absolutely love Palm berries ! My go to for every meal , snack and dessert (:
I am hooked on Palmberries! Not only are the smoothies and bowls delicious, the staff is wonderful too. Kalina is especially welcoming and always greets me when I pick up my online order.

Always enjoy the bowls. My wife and I usually get a bowl for a meal at night if we don't want to cook.  Very much enjoy them.  We get them to go.  Today I was getting a bowl  to go for dinner tonight as I will be staying on the road.  A very foul mouth young lady was in the back discussing he trip to the ER for walking pneumonia.  Ok I get it, you were upset for whatever reason, and you were talking to your fellow employees. She had a very nasty mouth cursing and very negative.  I really don't care, for my sake. She didn't know what kind of customers were out front, cursing and talking very ugly and loud enough for me to hear all about her ER visit and how the doctor didn't give her the antibiotics she needed. Who cares!! Please use your better judgment next time to watch you foul mouth.
A quaint Little gem in Denver. I love this place!
Always have a great experience when visiting.
so good!!
So good!
Everyone is always so kind and my favorite place to eat!
Always enjoy my Palm berry bowls.  The staff is friendly and professional.  Bowls are fresh and delicious.  There is a gluten free granola option
Customer service is great! Customers are greeted with a smile. Atmosphere is welcoming.
Workers are very nice and good clean store and the food was excellent I totally recommend this place to eat if u love fruit
Love getting a bowl or smoothie here! Delicious!
Placed a mobile order for a Sami Bowl recently and was very pleased with everything.  Food tasted great, service was top notch and the atmosphere was great.  Will definitely be back!
Great healthy place to eat

I absolutely love the food here and order the bowls for pickup often. Best açaí bowl I’ve ever had!

However, the cleaner that they use inside is super strong, like pine sol or something. I couldn’t wait to get out of there and definitely could not have sat and ate a meal inside.
This place is awesome and do are the employee
Very cool store with great service
always great food and staff is very nice!
Great food choices.
Really fast calm and yummy

I could go on about how amazing Palm Berries is. Nothing beats it! I absolutely love the options, especially the Sami Bowl. I usually substitute almonds for strawberries because it’s pretty filling, but you can add anything! The Acai is refreshing and does not melt fast. The fruit is always fresh and prepared perfectly. I also choose gluten free/vegan granola.

review_questions.Recommended dishes: Nutella, Chocolate Chips, Classic Base Jumbo Create Your Own Bowl

reviews_data.review_text:
7-18-24, 743p:
Attentive and greeted me with a smile: long-haired Michael understands the needs and concerns of going above and beyond to meet customer expectations. A business truly needs more employees like him to understand the customer’s stomach is where your money is. That young man needs to be recognized for his outstanding service and commitment to happiness and nutritional values. Most places have teenagers hanging around chatting and on their phones, literally doing nothing: we had more than one worker ask us if we needed anything, while another was busy taking trash out and trying to get the store cleaned up. Really appreciate seeing a team like this and will continue to come here in the future especially during the summer when unable to consume hot unhealthy food options nearby. This place can easily be breakfast, lunch, dinner, dessert or a snack and I wouldn’t have it any other way. Thank you for being here.
Palm Bowl, granola, extra Nutella
-H
Love Palm Berries in Denver!  Great staff and awesome smoothies and berry bowls!

I’m been coming here for years. The prices have just gone up and the food quality has just gotten worse. Today I went and got a bowl. The pineapple on it is my favorite part, it was so unripe and no flavor. For $15 do better.
Amazing all the way around.
I love Palm Berries but some products they use are not the best and contain Bioengineered ingredients, i.e Nutella and other sauces /granola,  just be aware before adding to your bowl or shake!
I’m gonna try them all but I’m stuck on the Sami. Amazing!
Reagan was so knowledgeable and kind while taking our order.
Everything I have tried is amazing and it’s the best açaí around! Always fast and amazing environment
I love this place, I could eat this every day. The staff is also very friendly.
Awesome every time
People are always helpful and pleasant, I love the products they are so tasty and there are a lot of yummy choices!😊
Best Acai Bowls around! Loaded with add-ons and delicious.

Protein.
Bowl was amazing, The place was very clean,and smells amazing!!! Great staff

3/16i order from this place multiple times a week. I called to ask if I had time to still order but the kid that answered was rude and told me to hold so I did… called back 5 mins laters after waiting and they had turned the phones off. I won’t be back.
Great place to grab a quick liquid lunch that’s healthy.
This place is perfect, the best acai bowls in the area! The portions for a regular sized bowl are actually filling! And the fruit is very fresh, anytime I order from here its amazing.
As soon as I walk in it is such an amazing environment. Always excited for my bowl!

Yummy 😋😋😋
Make your sign bigger! I never knew this place was here!

I was so excited to once again get a bowl of açaí! After a short shopping trip, I treated myself to a dessert. I could not remember what I got last time but after showing a picture of my previous bowl the cashier confirmed it as the palm bowl. He was right and I’m grateful! Service was quick. Presentation was great but the taste was supreme! I got the snack size and it was more than enough for one person. Nice ambiance and music was fun. Great experience!
The service is always very friendly and quick. The food is always delicious. Palm Berries is my favorite place to get food from.
Tried the Harvest Bowl - she LOVED IT!!
Great service and food
One of my favorite restaurants! Everything is delicious and there are so many options. I always thoroughly enjoy every aspect of my visits.
Quick easy ordering process. Tap to pay, didn’t have to wait more than 5 mins and bowls were ready to go!
I would rate 10 stars if I could. Palms Berries you are the best!
Best açaí ever
Not only is their smoothies and bowls amazing every time I go, so is the atmosphere inside. It’s a very unique place.
Yummy!!

I love the bowls here and the staff are friendly. I recently moved to the area and tried PB for the first time last week. I’ve already been back twice. Really fresh and delicious ingredients. So glad to have a great smoothie place!

review_questions.Recommended dishes: Classic Acai Base, Blueberries, Almond Butter

reviews_data.review_text: Love the presentation of the bowls & theres a lot in them! They hook you up 🎉
The atmosphere is calm and clean. Service is very friendly and fast. The food is absolutely amazing!
Bowls are always delish!

review_questions.Recommended dishes: Classic Acai Base, White Chocolate, Blueberries

reviews_data.review_text: I literally stop here at least 3 times a week... I LOVE IT HERE!!
Love my fruit bowls could eat them everyday 😆
I crave Palm Berries every so often, nice to have this nearby and service is always fast

Very friendly and extremely good! Every time I go food is fresh and delish. Love this place! They will give you a sample of the bases if you are not sure which one you want. Highly recommend. Great place! Super cute on the inside!!!
Love the create your own bowl!!!   So good!
Definitely my favorite açai bowl place, a good amount of fruit and generous portions.  The snack is usually more than sufficient.
Really great food and nice people!
Since discovering Palm Berries in Denver, NC we’ve become OBSESSED!!  Everything is delicious and the staff is so personable! They have even memorized our favorites before ordering 😁
The new Island Bowl is delicious!
Always fantastic customer service, and best açaí bowls ever (from someone who eats them all over the country)!!! Love the sunset bowl!
We love palm, berries, açai bowls and smoothies!

This was my first time visiting.  The cashier who greeted me was friendly, but the manager seemed a bit perturbed that I arrived 30 minutes before closing and wasn't sure what I wanted to try. The smoothie bowl that I got was decent, but overall it just wasn't a welcoming experience. Therefore, I probably won't be returning.
Staff are so sweet! Fruit is always fresh and tasty. Bowls were made quickly and visually appealing
Great bowls and fast and friendly service.  Highly recommend this place.  Perfect Summer food.
Taylor was professional and effective with my on “the go” order! It was thoroughly completed and DELICIOUS‼️
The cashier was very sweet and helpful. Very respectful as well!

I love the palm berry bowls!!! I recently tried smoothie King's version ( closer to my house) and was so disappointed. They are not worth it compared to the palm Berry quality!!!! Palmberry has so much more fruit in their bowls, much higher quality. Whenever I am in Denver I always order it for myself and my daughter :) she always asks for it!!
Always outstanding! Love the options and fresh ingredients…
They are always nice an very friendly at both locations I go to an I love the fruit bowls..
The best açaí bowls in the area.  We live in Huntersville and will drive to this location
Smoothies are always delicious and all the workers are polite and pleasant to interact with!
Cute and I love it

review_questions.Recommended dishes: Classic Base Jumbo Create Your Own Bowl

reviews_data.review_text: This place is awesome! Everything from the fruit bowls and yogurts and even the environment AND Art on the walls, it's just such a good vibing place! I love it and go at least once a week!
Nice smoothies, great variety, prices a bit high. Worst though is the overwhelming scent of Fabuloso cleaner. I could never set inside there and eat.
good everytime, fresh fruit, fast service, friendly workers🙌❤️
One of the best acai bowls I’ve ever had.
#Addicted. Haven’t had anything here I didn’t LOVE. I drive about 20 minutes one way a couple times a week to get a bowl.
Very nice employees and the service was great! I ordered 4 bowls and they were ready so fast!
Really enjoyed my experience here. Very clean place with really yummy and healthy Açaí options. Will be coming back!
Awesome fruit bowls!! We love Palm Berries. Staff is excellent!!
Love the bowls. Wish they had smaller size. I would go more often.

The best acai bowl you'll ever have!! The fruit is always fresh & ripe, the base is flavorful & smooth, and there are a lot of toppings to choose from.  It's a treat to have this locally owned business in town; you won't be disappointed & you'll become a regular!!
Friendly staff and delicious bowls! I can eat here everyday.
Staff was friendly and quick
Took the fiance here for the first time. It's one of my favorite places to stop when I go on my lunchbreak, and now it's his too!! That's for always making delicious smoothies 😋
I always get the Sami bowl it's delicious! The staff is so friendly, fast and efficient.
Keep up the good work- maybe consider different music- like KLOVE
Love Palm Berries! Always fast and delicious ♡
Really enjoy the fresh fruits and healthy toppings at Palm Berries! The Denver, NC staff is very efficient and kind.
I LOVE the Pure Bowl at Palm Berries! It is delicious!!
Super fast and delicious as usual!  Everyone so friendly!
Always nice, helpful and the food is always delicious ❤️
If you are looking for fresh açaí bowl; it’s here in Denver and I got 10% off too.
Everyone is always so friendly, and the food is great!
Cant find any other acai place that tastes as good as this one!!
First and last time coming.. paid a lot for the queen city bowl for half of the fruit, that was suppose to be added missing!
One of the best açaí bowls I’ve had since moving to Charlotte!
My favorite !
Bowls are delicious! Had a great patient gal today taking my order.
Thought i would give this place a try. Love the many different options and substitutions offered. Very friendly and thoughtful employees. Food was amazing and fresh.  Will be coming back.
Love Palm Berries. Fresh açaí & fruit.
I love eating here the smoothies and the bowls are delicious.
Always a great place to go
Everything is so good here. And great service too.
Love this place, our bowls are always completed as requested!
employees are so nice, love the store and environment!!!
Quick and refreshing! Friendly team, excellent bowls!
I love the various fruit options, it's always delicious!
Absolutely love this place!!
Best açaí bowls I’ve ever had. I’ve become a regular now. I get one 1-2 times a week. Love this place!
Greta service and amazing food!
Always a great experience at Palm Berries of Denver!
Always a wonderful experience with amazing fruit bowls and smoothies!
Absolutely love the coconut bowl. It’s amazing
Best place around nothing like it anywhere else. The staff is always super helpful and friendly.
The best qcai bowls I haver ever had!!  The pure base is phenomenal!!
I love Palm Berries, it tastes great, but feels healthy and light.
Every store has been amazing.  I order frequently as it is well worth it! All staff has been amazing and quick.  Love that the app is extremely user friendly.
Alway delicious. The bowls are a nice refreshing change from the typical snack or meal. They are very filling.
Great service!
Absolutely love their acai bowls!!!! If I could afford one every day, I'd be one way!!! Very fresh fruit!!!!!
Very good.
Palm Berries is a favorite of our entire family.  The BEST Acai bowls we have ever had anywhere!  So refreshing and delicious!

My first time ever having an açaí bowl…wow. Absolutely delicious. My friend always talks about Palm Berries so I had to give it a try. I was blown away by how tasty the bowl was!! The serving was also huge and I will have to finish the rest tomorrow. (And I can’t wait for that😂). I got the Palm Bowl. Yum yum yum!!!!
Food is soooo good and refreshing!!!

So good! Super fresh and well priced. Cutest dining area as well. Have ordered a couple times to my work and service was fast and the bowls were fresh! Will definitely be ordering from here regularly!
Food is good but bartender not so good.
They have the best açaí bowls I’ve ever had!!
I ordered online and payed in store and service was great. My Açaí bowl was completed in a timely manner and their prices were great compared to others.
Friendly staff, very clean, lots of options, and so good!
The green sip is very tasty!
After one visit I was hooked , there fruit bowls are always so fresh and delicious. I’m so glad denver now has a healthy snack option when your out and about.
The bowls are SO GOOD! They fill you up and are a healthy option for dessert!
Delicious!!!  Great service too!
Everything is always so fresh and delicious.
Absolutely love the options for my custom bowls!!! And as always.. my fruit was ripe and fresh, and made just right!!!
Rey good and great service.
We Love Palm Berries!  Honestly could eat a different bowl each meal.  Light but so filling!
Easy to order online and was ready quickly. It was so delicious!! Love Palm Berries.
Refreshing.. perfect meal to start with.
Place is good!

I loved coming here! bowls were always very good & decent prices. but the last time I went there I got really sick. I was throwing up so much, could barely walk because my stomach was cramping, & I had to have my husband come pick me up from work because I couldn't drive.
I think they may have used an expired ingredient or something. I'm not sure if I will return or not.
My orders are always completed accurately and promptly no matter the time of day or how many items. The staff is super helpful and friendly!
Always awesome! Favorite place for a smoothie bowl.
Best açaí bowls EVER!!!

I LOVE this place!!! 😋 Their açaí bowls are my absolute favorite (especially the “Sammy bowl” with granola, add strawberries!!) Sooo yummy!! Highly recommend!! Plus, they are always super friendly!! I could eat here every day of my life!! 🤤
So delicious and fresh.
We love Palm Berries!!! These bowls are so refreshing and the portions are  big enough to have leftovers for an after dinner treat! Friendly faces and great location!
Fresh bowls & fruit, amazing staff and environment! love everything about palm berries!
My daughter and I love Palm Berries. So fresh and yummy.  Best açaí bowls around.  Sunset is our favorite
My favorite place! Awesome customer service! Staff are very welcoming! Wish there was one I'm Gastonia NC

The bowls are delicious! Fresh ingredients and obviously crafted with care. The young staff are on their game. Friendly faces and excellent customer service skills, much appreciated in this world today.

It is sooo amazing especially if you like fruit! Ever since I've tried it the first time I've fell in love! It seems pricey but you get your moneys worth for sure! Plus you earn points ! Who doesn't love to earn points to save money!?! They are also super friendly!
Acái bowls are amazing. Staff is super friendly, and it’s a clean chill environment.
Love this place. Have been following them before they opened the actual store. So happy they are growing in business around Denver NC. Sami bowl is my go to and OMG...so yummy!!!!!
Just love going here amazing, people there are so friendly
Always great customer service and bowls are awesome!
So glad to have acai bowls in our area. We love coming here for a healthy breakfast on the go!
So good!!!
Just got my first bowl it was amazing.  I thought it was a little pricey,  but very very good.
An açaí bowl from Palmberries makes my day!
They always deliver customer service and their bowls are always consistent. My favorite açaí place.
Best place ever
I absolutely love this place. The bowls are absolutely amazing!!!
Always great, fresh and delicious
Always kind and always with a smile….. you make me feel welcome for someone that’s new in the area.  Thank you and look forward to seeing you more and more! 🙏🏾😃

Love Palm Berries! Just found them a few weeks ago and I'm hooked! Love making my own bowl and always freshly made while you wait! YUM!!!!
STAFF IS AWESOME!!!
highly recommend
Great service and quality product

A little alow but not by that kuch plus its all worth it the stuff here tastes AMAZING. It may appear pricy but I promise you get what you pay for, it looks small hut is VERY filling.

The staff seems rather polite as well so that's a plus!

I literally crave this place now it's so good!!!
Yums!
Love Palmberries!  The bowls are amazing!  Great place for a healthy treat!
Delicious!! Staff is always so nice. Such a wonderful addition to Denver. If you haven’t been yet, treat yourself!!
A guilt free indulgence! Flavor combinations that unique and delicious.
Always have a great experience at the Denver Palm Berries. Cute decor, friendly staff, and delicious bowls. Always a treat!!

Getting to indulge in a palm bowl is always a positive experience!  The fruit is always fresh.  The bowls are prepared when you order!  The environment is clean, relaxing, and the people there are always smiling!
You can't go wrong at palm berries!!!

The Palm Berries bowls are delicious! Love them!
One suggestion however. The restaurant was decked out to the hilt with Halloween decorations ( including a life size skeleton sitting at one of the tables) Since Halloween is the most holy day of Satanism I think that glorifying this day will offend many. I recommend  against this practice of decorating for Halloween.
Amazing Açaí!

reviews_data.review_text: The tastiest Smoothie bowl i ever been too and the most bang for your buck when dealing with quantity! My favorite Smoothie bowl spot!
The Sami bowl is my go to for a fulfilling lunch!
Love the Burn Boot Camp bowl!!! Highly recommend!!!! Everything is AMAZING though!!!
